yesterdayStoryline.headline: Torres extra-time strike crowns Spain world champions
yesterdayStoryline.subtitle: Spain defeat Argentina 1-0 after extra time to claim second World Cup

todayStoryline.headline: Players granted recovery day
todayStoryline.subtitle: No fixtures scheduled; squads rest, recover and begin post-tournament routines

lines: Spain controlled possession and pressed tirelessly, creating the clearest openings.
Torres' extra-time strike secured Spain's second World Cup, denying Argentina a title defence.

news.headline: US strikes Iranian targets as Tehran reports tanker explosions
news.body: The United States carried out strikes on Iranian sites after recent attacks on American personnel, while Iran's Revolutionary Guards reported explosions on two tankers in the southern Strait of Hormuz. International calls for restraint grew as governments urged de-escalation to avoid a wider regional conflict.

footerNote: All times converted from official kickoffs
